key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, and cow’s milk
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a $180 total budget. Must-have groceries include chicken breast (or turkey if cheaper), fresh spinach, cherry tomatoes, avocados, brown rice, olive oil, dairy-free Greek-style yogurt, and unsweetened almond milk. Stock up on pantry items (black beans, chickpeas, medium salsa, oats) and household supplies (paper towels, dish soap, kitchen trash bags). Preferences: avoid artificial fragrances; prefer eco-friendly packaging; avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk. Payment: household card ending 4821. Substitution questions: email kesha.williams@example.com.
